s3.bucket.notificationconfiguration.conf: Specifies object key name filtering rules. For information about key name filtering, see [Configuring Event Notifications](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/dev/NotificationHowTo.html) in the *Amazon S3 User Guide*.

s3.bucket.notificationconfiguration.conf.Description: A container for object key name prefix and suffix filtering rules.
